title: Fts3 offsets() function may report SQLITE_CORRUPT with empty string.
bug_features_seed: SELECT content, CASE WHEN content LIKE '%Hello%' THEN 'Match' ELSE 'No Match' END AS match_status FROM test_fts;
SELECT content, CASE WHEN content IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE content END AS null_check FROM test_fts;
key_bug_features: Fts3 offsets() function with empty string
